javaBlocks.rawText:
REPORT("Panel is in DISARMED state");
        panel.assertState(PanelState.DISARMED);

REPORT("No active alarms on panel");
        alarmManager.assertNoActiveAlarms();

REPORT("Master code entered at keypad");
        keypad.enterCode(config.getMasterCode());

REPORT("Panel transitions to ARMED AWAY");
        panel.assertState(PanelState.ARMED_AWAY);

zephyrSteps.description: Verify system is in DISARMED state before test begins
zephyrSteps.expectedResult: Panel dashboard shows DISARMED. No active alarms.
zephyrSteps.manualStep: Verify system is in DISARMED state before test begins
zephyrSteps.manualResult: Panel dashboard shows DISARMED. No active alarms.

zephyrSteps.description: User enters ARM AWAY code at keypad
zephyrSteps.expectedResult: Keypad accepts code, ARM AWAY sequence initiated
zephyrSteps.manualStep: User enters ARM AWAY code at keypad
zephyrSteps.automationStep: Enter master code and press ARM AWAY button
zephyrSteps.manualResult: Keypad accepts code, ARM AWAY sequence initiated

zephyrSteps.expectedResult: Panel shows exit delay countdown timer. Audible beep every second.
zephyrSteps.automationStep: Assert exit delay is active and wait for completion
zephyrSteps.manualResult: Panel shows exit delay countdown timer

zephyrSteps.description: Panel transitions to ARMED AWAY after exit delay completes
zephyrSteps.expectedResult: Panel state changes to ARMED AWAY. All sensors active.
zephyrSteps.manualStep: Panel transitions to ARMED AWAY after exit delay completes
zephyrSteps.manualResult: Panel state changes to ARMED AWAY
